name: io.github.brunovicco/openfinance-br-mcp
description: Secure Open Finance Brasil MCP server with typed tools and a credential-free mock mode

environmentVariables.name: ENVIRONMENT
environmentVariables.description: 'mock' (default, no credentials needed - runs entirely in-memory), 'sandbox', or 'production'

environmentVariables.name: CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Client ID registered with the participating institution. Required unless ENVIRONMENT=mock

environmentVariables.name: PRIVATE_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the RSA private key used for private_key_jwt and JAR signing outside mock mode

environmentVariables.name: PRIVATE_KEY_KID
environmentVariables.description: Key ID matching the registered client JWKS entry outside mock mode

environmentVariables.name: MTLS_CERT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the client mTLS certificate used outside mock mode

environmentVariables.name: MTLS_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the client mTLS private key used outside mock mode

environmentVariables.name: REDIS_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional Redis connection URL for persistent consent and token state

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Required only when calling list_transactions with categorize=true (DSPy transaction categorization)
